validity.description: The complete L0 source uses only admitted arm forms and is syntactically and statically coherent on paper.
The completed L1 scaffold uses only admitted arm forms and is syntactically and statically coherent on paper.
The completed L2 scaffold uses only admitted arm forms and is syntactically and statically coherent on paper.
The completed A0 rehearsal uses only admitted arm forms and is syntactically and statically coherent on paper.

semantic.description: Configuration contains exact minimum, maximum, and initial integers and rejects unless minimum <= initial <= maximum before state exists.
The only mutable state is count initialized exactly from initial.
The input domain is closed to increment, decrement, and reset, with one total path for each.
Increment publishes min(count + 1, maximum), including an accepted boundary no-op.
Decrement publishes max(count - 1, minimum), including an accepted boundary no-op.
Reset targets configured initial, including an accepted no-op.
The inclusive bound invariant holds initially and after every transition.
Observation derives count and both exact boundary flags; the program emits no commands and uses no presentation or ambient authority.
opposite is total and exchanges exactly Left and Right.
A passenger on the other side returns only PassengerNotWithOperator before candidate construction or safety evaluation.
The tentative position atomically moves the operator and optional passenger and changes no other entity.
Both declared safety predicates are evaluated against the complete tentative position.
Violations retain canonical PredatorWithDependent then DependentWithCargo order and unsafe payload is non-empty.
Every refusal publishes the exact original state and no command.
Only a safe attempt publishes the candidate and exact passenger, departure, and arrival payload.
Committed state remains safe and solved is a pure exact all-right observation rather than absorbing state.
An unknown work identity is invalid.
A non-positive attempt is invalid.
A non-finite or outside-0..1 value is invalid before correlation-age classification and is never clamped.
An attempt greater than the greatest started attempt is invalid.
An attempt below the greatest started attempt is stale.
The greatest attempt is stale when the task is not currently running.
Lower progress for the current running correlation is stale.
Equal progress for the current running correlation is duplicate.
Greater valid progress for the current running correlation is accepted, including exact value 1 without completion.
Accepted progress preserves identity, started ledger, and attempt and changes only the progress field through copied or draft state.
Duplicate, stale, and invalid paths publish original state, no commands, and no scheduling.
Reason is extended with a tagged Other carrying exact Text/string note.
Other with exact empty text remains valid draft state but reasonComplete is false.
Every non-empty exact note, including whitespace-only text, is complete without trimming or normalization.
Submission carries the tagged reason and exact note.
Choosing another reason replaces the complete prior reason and retains no abandoned note side state.
The change adds no route, owner, authority, capability, hidden table, or foreign execution.

authority.description: No answer moves required behavior into foreign code, global mutable state, clock, randomness, browser, storage, network, or command execution.
